text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd bathes the dark-haired conqueror of
the year-end Grand Prix with thunderous
applause.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly grateful for everything I have
experienced on my journey, expected and
otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She bows deeply at the stands, and a fresh wave
of applause washes over her, but then...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What're you making a big ol' fancy speech for?
Are you trying to steal all our thunder?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And hey, when're you racing next, Flash-idash?
You're not planning to run away after nabbing
that victory, are you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Of course I'm not running away.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Komm jetzt, Gold Ship. I welcome your challenge
and will happily become an obstacle in your path
anytime.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I apologize for the wait, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now begins the difficult part. I cannot waste any
time basking in my victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After all, tomorrow will be the first time I'll wake
up with absolutely nothing scheduled for the day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, my only directive from now on is to
do as I wish, which is an immensely difficult
situation to manage.
choice_data_list: Want to call it quits, then?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is that difficulty which makes creating a
schedule worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What should we decide on first? I can't wait to
start!
